rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the target component type scope when contracts reference only component type features
Place AGREE annex blocks in the target implementation scope when contracts reference implementation-specific features or subcomponents
generic_rules: Preserve the AADL architecture by inserting annex blocks at the correct scope level
Use visible identifiers from the current scope to maintain traceability
Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type annex blocks
Ensure all referenced features are visible in the target scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` for valid AGREE syntax
anti_patterns: Do not place contracts in scopes where referenced features are not visible
Avoid mixing component type and implementation features in the same annex block
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
